meta.meta_description: See inside any stack, any app, at any scale, anywhere.
meta.og:title: Cloud Monitoring as a Service | Datadog
meta.og:description: See metrics from all of your apps, tools & services in one place with Datadog’s cloud monitoring as a service solution. Try it for free.

pt.tagline: Veja dentro de qualquer pilha, qualquer aplicativo, em qualquer escala, em qualquer lugar.
pt.description: A Datadog é uma plataforma de monitoramento de nuvem que fornece visibilidade e insights sobre o desempenho de aplicativos e infraestrutura. A empresa oferece uma variedade de produtos e serviços para ajudar as organizações a monitorar e otimizar seus sistemas. Com uma abordagem baseada em nuvem, a Datadog ajuda as empresas a migrar para a nuvem e a garantir a segurança e a conformidade de seus sistemas.

en.tagline: See inside any stack, any app, at any scale, anywhere
en.description: Datadog is a cloud monitoring as a service solution that provides metrics from all of your apps, tools, and services in one place. The platform offers a range of products and features for infrastructure and application monitoring, security, and digital experience. Datadog aims to provide visibility across systems, apps, and services, enabling customers to monitor, troubleshoot, and optimize application performance.

market_size_estimate.text: O mercado de monitoramento de nuvem e segurança está em constante crescimento, com uma estimativa de tamanho de mercado de cerca de R$ 10 bilhões

growth_trend.text: O crescimento do mercado de monitoramento de nuvem e segurança é impulsionado pela adoção de tecnologias em nuvem e a necessidade de segurança cibernética

likely_competitors.text: New Relic - empresa de monitoramento de aplicativos
Splunk - empresa de gerenciamento de logs e segurança
Dynatrace - empresa de monitoramento de aplicativos e infraestrutura

competitive_advantages.text: Datadog oferece uma plataforma de monitoramento de nuvem e segurança completa e integrada
A empresa tem uma forte presença no mercado de tecnologia e uma base de clientes estabelecida

market_challenges.text: A concorrência no mercado de monitoramento de nuvem e segurança é intensa
A adoção de tecnologias em nuvem e a necessidade de segurança cibernética podem ser desafios para as empresas

customer_pain_points.text: Dificuldade em monitorar e gerenciar a infraestrutura e os aplicativos em nuvem
Necessidade de melhorar a segurança cibernética e proteger contra ameaças

buying_triggers.text: Necessidade de melhorar a eficiência e a escalabilidade da infraestrutura e dos aplicativos
Necessidade de melhorar a segurança cibernética e proteger contra ameaças

decision_makers.text: Diretores de TI e segurança cibernética

sales_cycle_estimate.text: O ciclo de vendas pode levar de 3 a 6 meses

ideal_customer_characteristics.text: Empresas de tecnologia e financeiras que utilizam tecnologias em nuvem
Empresas que valorizam a segurança cibernética e a eficiência da infraestrutura e dos aplicativos

anti_icp_signals.text: Empresas que não utilizam tecnologias em nuvem ou não valorizam a segurança cibernética

expansion_opportunities.text: Expansão para mercados emergentes e desenvolvimento de novos produtos e serviços

industry_trends.text: Adoção de tecnologias em nuvem e segurança cibernética
Desenvolvimento de soluções de monitoramento e segurança para IoT e dispositivos móveis

market_size_estimate.text: The cloud monitoring and security market is expected to grow significantly, driven by the increasing adoption of cloud services and the need for robust security and monitoring solutions.

growth_trend.text: The market is expected to grow rapidly, driven by the increasing demand for cloud-based services and the need for advanced security and monitoring solutions.

likely_competitors.text: New Relic - a leading provider of application performance monitoring and analytics solutions
Splunk - a leading provider of security, monitoring, and analytics solutions
Dynatrace - a leading provider of application performance monitoring and analytics solutions

competitive_advantages.text: Datadog's platform provides real-time visibility into cloud-based applications and infrastructure, enabling customers to quickly identify and resolve issues.
Datadog's AI-powered observability and security capabilities provide advanced insights and automation, enabling customers to improve their security and monitoring posture.

market_challenges.text: The increasing complexity of cloud-based applications and infrastructure, making it challenging for customers to monitor and secure their environments.
The need for advanced security and monitoring solutions, driven by the increasing threat of cyber-attacks and data breaches.

customer_pain_points.text: Difficulty in monitoring and securing cloud-based applications and infrastructure, due to the complexity and scale of these environments.
The need for real-time visibility and advanced analytics to quickly identify and resolve issues, and to improve overall security and monitoring posture.

buying_triggers.text: The need for advanced security and monitoring solutions, driven by the increasing threat of cyber-attacks and data breaches.
The desire to improve overall security and monitoring posture, and to reduce the risk of downtime and data loss.

decision_makers.text: IT and security professionals, responsible for monitoring and securing cloud-based applications and infrastructure.
DevOps and engineering teams, responsible for developing and deploying cloud-based applications.

sales_cycle_estimate.text: The sales cycle is expected to be moderate to long, due to the complexity of the solutions and the need for evaluation and testing.

ideal_customer_characteristics.text: Large to medium-sized enterprises, with complex cloud-based applications and infrastructure.
Organizations with a strong focus on security and monitoring, and a desire to improve their overall security and monitoring posture.

anti_icp_signals.text: Lack of budget or resources to invest in advanced security and monitoring solutions.
Satisfaction with current security and monitoring solutions, and a lack of desire to change or upgrade.

expansion_opportunities.text: Expansion into new markets, such as Asia-Pacific and Latin America, where cloud adoption is increasing rapidly.
Development of new solutions and features, such as advanced AI and machine learning capabilities, to address emerging customer needs.

industry_trends.text: Increasing adoption of cloud-based services, driven by the need for scalability, flexibility, and cost savings.
Growing demand for advanced security and monitoring solutions, driven by the increasing threat of cyber-attacks and data breaches.
